description: AI image generation and editing with prompt optimization and quality presets
name: io.github.shinpr/mcp-image

environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for image generation when IMAGE_PROVIDER=gemini (get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for image generation when IMAGE_PROVIDER=openai. Requires OpenAI organization verification to access gpt-image-2 (https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/general)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to directory where generated images will be saved (defaults to ./output)
environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_OUTPUT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Default quality preset: 'fast' (Nano Banana 2, default), 'balanced' (Nano Banana 2 + thinking), 'quality' (Nano Banana Pro)
environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_QUALITY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable automatic prompt optimization and use direct prompts
environmentVariables.name: SKIP_PROMPT_ENHANCEMENT
